requestedAction: Approve merging the Social Media Management System v1 draft/staging approval and build package into AG OS source of truth.
scope: This approval package, if converted into an active approved lock, allows only the AG OS source-of-truth package for Social Media Management System v1 to be reviewed and merged. It does not authorize repository creation, branch creation, file changes in a product repo, Netlify deployment, n8n workflow creation or activation, social account connection, credential handling, live posting, scheduling, outbound messaging, analytics API usage, paid tools, production/customer data, Lead Gen changes, AI Receptionist changes, or Constitution changes.
revocationPath: This approval is revoked, expired, cancelled, or invalidated when the owner says stop or revoke, the package scope expands beyond AG OS source-of-truth planning records and docs, validation fails, boot check fails, CI fails, any live action becomes necessary, any prohibited action becomes necessary, client-specific private data is requested, a credential is needed, a paid service is needed, or the action tries to create, build, deploy, connect, schedule, post, message, or access production/customer data.

evidence.reference: Current thread owner instruction requested a Social Media Management System v1 approval/build package only, with no live build, no repo creation, no deployment, no social connection, no credentials, no posting, no scheduling, no n8n live automation, and no paid tools.
npm.cmd run validate, npm.cmd run boot:check, node --test tests/*.test.mjs, and git diff --check must pass before package merge.
